base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of small_mario_walk — a character (playable) from 1985 super mario bros. left-foot-forward stride, mid-stride neutral, right-foot-forward stride. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 3-frame walk cycle — left-foot-forward stride, mid-stride neutral, right-foot-forward stride; arms swing in counter-phase to legs
